title: Single from_uri dispatch function with all cfg guards: correct architecture
description: secretx/src/lib.rs contains the only place in the entire workspace with #[cfg(feature)] guards. All 15 backends are dispatched from a single match in from_uri(). This design invariant (CLAUDE.md: 'no cfg guards anywhere except the 15-line dispatch function') is correct: it prevents feature-gated code from scattering across backend crates, makes it trivial to see which backends exist, and keeps feature-powerset checks meaningful. A contributor might suggest adding cfg guards inside backend crates for 'flexibility' — resist this.
